use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for form submissions and key user actions
Destructive action buttons for delete or dangerous operations
Outline buttons for secondary actions in UI flows
Ghost and dim buttons for tertiary navigation or subtle interactions
Icon-integrated buttons with expandable arrow indicators for dropdown triggers
ai_summary: A versatile button component with 10 visual variants (primary, mono, destructive, secondary, outline, dashed, ghost, dim, foreground, inverse) supporting multiple sizes and states. Built with CVA for type-safe variant composition, featuring hover states, open states for dropdown behavior, and Lucide icon integration with shrink animation. Suitable for SaaS applications, dashboards, and any interface requiring consistent action triggers.
